title: coffea mufindiensis subsp. pawekiana
intro: Coffea mufindiensis subsp. pawekiana is a subspecies of the Coffea mufindiensis plant, a wild coffee species native to Tanzania. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Coffea mufindiensis subsp. pawekiana include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as potential neuroprotective and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion or decoction, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy in traditional medicine.
